text: Hello? Can you hear me? Can you hear me? Hi, this is Chelsea. We pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note showing your 2020 update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Do you have both part A and part B? No. Sorry. It looks like you don't qualify for the plans. Have a great day.
